name: code-insights
description: Track Sourcegraph search result counts over time to visualize code trends, compare metrics, and manage insight dashboards

create_insight.description: Create a new insight (tracked metric) — aligns with createLineChartSearchInsight

interval.description: Collection interval in hours (default: 24, informational — actual scheduling is external)

update_insight.description: Update an insight's query, description, or interval — aligns with updateLineChartSearchInsight

name.description: Name of the insight to update

collect.description: Run a collection for a specific insight or all insights

name.description: Specific insight to collect (if omitted, collects all)

series_points.description: Show the time-series data points for an insight with ASCII sparkline chart — aligns with InsightsSeries.points

format.description: Output format: text or json (default: text)

compare.description: Compare two insights side by side

live_preview.description: Get current values for all insights without storing results — aligns with searchInsightLivePreview

list_views.description: List all insight views with their status — aligns with insightViews

delete_view.description: Delete an insight view and all its collected data — aligns with deleteInsightView

name.description: Name of the insight to delete

validate_query.description: Validate a search query for use in insights — aligns with validateScopedInsightQuery

create_dashboard.description: Create a named dashboard grouping insights — aligns with createInsightsDashboard

list_dashboards.description: List all dashboards — aligns with insightsDashboards

add_to_dashboard.description: Add an insight view to a dashboard — aligns with addInsightViewToDashboard

dashboard.description: Dashboard name to add the insight to

remove_from_dashboard.description: Remove an insight view from a dashboard — aligns with removeInsightViewFromDashboard

dashboard.description: Dashboard name to remove the insight from

health.description: Check Sourcegraph connectivity, Vault credentials, and database state
